selected_categories.description: List of sound-effect category selections for the scene. Each entry must be an object with a 'category' string key, NOT a bare string. Example: [{"category": "horror_ambience"}, {"category": "footsteps"}].

category.description: Category identifier from the SFX catalog passed in the prompt context (e.g. 'horror_ambience', 'footsteps', 'wind').
